title: How a man of God leads when it costs him something
caption:
Real leadership costs you first.

Not the loudest voice. Not the title. Not "do what I say because I'm in charge."

First into the apology. First to serve. First to take the hit when something goes wrong. First to tell the truth before it becomes a confrontation.

That's the pattern. Christ led by going to the cross before he asked anything of anyone. If you want to lead like that — at home, at work, with your friends — it starts with a willingness to absorb cost you didn't earn.

The room follows the man who leads from the front of the hard thing.

—

Save this for a man you're watching grow into a leader.

#faith #leadership #scripture #godlymen #christianmen #discipleship #manofgod #proverbs
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
